summary: Core PowerShell logic is excellent (glob conversion, priority ordering, error handling, Set-StrictMode, proper param validation). Pester unit tests well-structured. CRITICAL: Missing fixture files (fixtures/rules.json, fixtures/case_docs_only/changed.txt, etc.) cause Run-ActHarness assertions to fail at ~line 93-95 (Test-Path checks); integration tests cannot run through act. Actions not pinned to full commit SHA—uses actions/checkout@v4 instead of @[40-char SHA] (supply chain & best-practices violation). Workflow structure sound otherwise (permissions, triggers, pwsh shell). Without fixtures, the solution is untestable and unmaintainable.
